# `ClearSound`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, OK64  
**Parameters:** `—`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>ClearSound();</h3>
<ul>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Stops all sound output to SID chip (setting all volumes to zero).</p>
